analyst_briefing: No changes recommended to preliminary confidence levels across five weekly candidates; all supported by Tier 1 sources meeting FCW thresholds (two High, two Confirmed/High, one Assessed). ENGINE-20260504-004 confirmed as continuation of ongoing Russian Doppelganger/narrative warfare cluster via recycled Ukraine/NATO themes. RU posture shows increased tempo with Moldova playbook transfer to Armenia elections (ENGINE-20260504-001) and infrastructure sanctions (ENGINE-20260504-002). CN exhibits new TTP in AI-generated amplification of RU narratives (ENGINE-20260504-004). Escalation flags: WDM-HIGH for Armenia electoral FIMI; ESA-MEDIUM for EU targeting; AGM-MEDIUM for AI use. IR, Gulf, US, IL remain at monitoring with no new activity. No contested findings or human reviews required. RU dominance persists at 29% of 2025 incidents per EEAS.
